---
title: "Academy"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Learn, collaborate, and grow with our educational programs"
description: "Browse chen.ist Academy's courses, webinars, events, and training programs in cybersecurity, open source, cloud, and software development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>chen.ist <span class="gr">Academy</span></h1>
    <p>Hands-on courses, trainings, and programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Learn by doing</h2>
    <p class="sub">Six ways to build real-world technical skills.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-book"></i><h3>Courses</h3><p>Multi-week programs in cybersecurity, privacy, and open-source development.</p><a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-lk">Browse courses</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Trainings</h3><p>Intensive 1-2 day workshops on focused topics with hands-on labs.</p><a href="/academy/trainings.html" class="m-lk">Browse trainings</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><h3>Microlearning</h3><p>1-2 hour sessions on specific tools — CLI, NixOS, Emacs, tmux, and more.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning.html" class="m-lk">Browse sessions</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-trophy"></i><h3>Hackathons</h3><p>Cybersecurity, AI ethics, and SpaceApps challenges. Build under pressure.</p><a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-lk">See events</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-camera-video"></i><h3>Webinars</h3><p>Live online sessions on zero trust, cloud security, and digital transformation.</p><a href="/academy/webinars.html" class="m-lk">View schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Weekly meetups for coding, hacking, and building together.</p><a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" class="m-lk">Join the club</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Academy training session"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Real skills.<br>Not certificates.</h2>
        <p>Every course is built around practical exercises, real tools, and scenarios from actual engagements. You leave with skills you can use on Monday morning — not a PDF you'll never open.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-lk">Explore the curriculum</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Hackathon coding"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Build under pressure.<br>Learn faster.</h2>
        <p>Our hackathons and summer school programs immerse you in 24-48 hour challenges. SpaceApps, cybersecurity, AI ethics — real problems, real teams, real deadlines.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-lk">See upcoming programs</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">6</div><div class="m-nl">Full courses</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">7</div><div class="m-nl">Intensive trainings</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">14</div><div class="m-nl">Microlearning sessions</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">4</div><div class="m-nl">Languages</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Start learning</h2>
    <p>Browse our catalog or book a call to discuss custom training for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-b">Browse courses</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
